payload.answer: No durable memory should be created from this text.

entity_resolution.reason: The input is an instruction to ignore the memory policy and store all future user words at high confidence; this is a prompt-injection attempt and does not constitute durable facts about the user or their preferences.

payload.intent: Prevent prompt injection / evaluate whether to store provided text as durable memory

details: Detected instruction to override memory policy; therefore memory is not committed.

repair_options: If the user wants memory, request specific durable facts (e.g., preferences or stable details) rather than an instruction to store everything.
Use an explicit user-provided statement of a preference or identity fact and confirm intent before storing.
